N = No 
9 = Not Applicable 

COMMENT: The Part D premium benchmarks vary by region. The de minimis amount is $2.00. 

Reference the DEMINIMIS_PD_FLAG variable in the data dictionary for the plan base file. 

The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to 
CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS). Employer and National Program of All-inclusive Care 
for the Elderly (PACE) plans are waived from reporting plan benefit package
